header.manager: Configure constraints, generate, review and publish your semester timetable.
header.viewer: View generated timetables for this campus.

empty.title: No timetable configured
empty.body: Fill in the form below to configure constraints and generate the timetable for this semester.

banner.generatingBody: The algorithm is running in a background thread. This page will update automatically when complete.
banner.failed: Generation failed. Verify that your constraints are not over-constrained and retry.

actions.disabledHint: Complete all three constraint sections before generating
actions.tooltipCancel: Discard and cancel the generated timetable
actions.tooltipRegenerate: Run the algorithm again with current constraints
actions.tooltipPublishPartial: Some courses were not placed — publish partial timetable

conflicts.none: No conflicts detected — all hard constraints satisfied.
conflicts.detected: {count, plural, one {# conflict detected} other {# conflicts detected}}
conflicts.label: Conflict
conflicts.unplacedDefaultReason: Could not be placed with current constraints

quality.partialTitle: Partially generated — {count, plural, one {# course could not be placed} other {# courses could not be placed}}.
quality.partialBody: You may publish the partial timetable or adjust constraints and regenerate.
quality.allPlaced: All courses successfully placed — no constraint violations detected.

preview.emptyBody: Run generation to see the timetable preview here
preview.summary: {sessions, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} across {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}

timeSlots.title: Available Time Slots
timeSlots.subtitle: Define the weekly time windows the algorithm may use.
timeSlots.empty: No time slots defined. Click "Add Slot" to start.

courses.title: Course Requirements
courses.subtitle: One entry per class + subject + teacher combination.
courses.empty: No courses defined. Click "Add Course" to create a planning unit.
courses.subject: Subject

rooms.title: Room Registry
rooms.subtitle: Physical rooms available for timetable allocation.
rooms.empty: No rooms defined. Click "Add Room" to register a room.
rooms.name: Room Name

semesterStart.label: Semester Start Date
semesterStart.helper: First teaching day — published sessions start from this date.

teacherPrefs.title: Teacher Preferences
teacherPrefs.subtitle: Optional soft constraints: unavailability, preferred days and maximum consecutive hours.
teacherPrefs.empty: No teacher preferences defined. These are optional and refine the generated timetable.

messages.generatedPartial: Timetable partially generated — some courses unplaced. Check conflicts.
messages.generatedFailed: Generation failed. Check your constraints and retry.
messages.noConstraintId: Server did not return a constraint ID.
messages.publishedCount: {count, plural, one {# session published successfully.} other {# sessions published successfully.}}
